new_value.value: During office hours (Mon–Fri, ~8:30–17:00), Clara answers the main line for new and small service calls, collects caller details, and notifies Ben via email and SMS so he or his team can follow up and schedule work.

previous_value.value: Ben sometimes answers after-hours calls himself; limited emergencies for specific property managers, others often deferred.
previous_value.source_quote: Ben explains his after-hours behavior: he is on call, handles specific gas station emergencies, defers many others.

new_value.value: After hours, Clara filters calls. For general callers, Clara collects details and promises a next-business-day follow-up. For the specific gas-station property manager client, Clara treats calls as emergencies and patches them to Ben.
